rationale: The page contains a table detailing the distribution of inscriptions in the UNESCO Memory of the World Register across various global regions and international organizations.
cleanedText:
Region | Number of inscriptions to the Register
Memory of the World Register – Africa | 41
Memory of the World Register – Arab States | 24
Memory of the World Register – Asia and the Pacific | 180
Memory of the World Register – Europe and North America | 315
Memory of the World Register – Latin America and the Caribbean | 83
Memory of the World Register – International Organizations | 10
